topics.name: Quadratic Equations
topics.content: A quadratic equation has the form ax^2 + bx + c = 0 where a ≠ 0.

topics.name: Arithmetic Progression
topics.content: An AP is a sequence where difference between consecutive terms is constant.

topics.name: Triangles
topics.content: Triangles have three sides and three angles. Sum of angles is 180°.

topics.name: Statistics
topics.content: Mean = sum of observations / total observations.
